# UC-22.6.57 · ISO/IEC 27001 A.8.2 — Cisco ISE Privileged Admin Role-Change Evidence

> **Criticality:** High &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Security &middot; **Type:** Compliance, Security

*We continuously evidence ISO 27001 A.8.2 by capturing every ISE admin role change. That is important for the audit, where proof needs to line up with what the rules expect.*

---

## Description

We continuously evidence ISO 27001 A.8.2 by capturing every ISE admin role change as audit-quality evidence.

## Value

ISO auditors require evidence of privileged-access lifecycle. This UC turns operational ISE admin events into compliance evidence with attribution (who changed what, when, and from where).

## Implementation

Daily schedule. Forward-only — never delete or mutate the audit_evidence index entries.

## Evidence

Saved search results archived to `audit_evidence` with ISO 27001 A.8.2 tagging; monthly evidence pack PDF/CSV exports.

## Control test

### Positive scenario

Grant an admin a super-admin role. UC-22.6.57 logs the event in audit_evidence with A.8.2 tagging within 5 min.

### Negative scenario

No role changes. Empty result set.

## Detailed Implementation

## Prerequisites

- UC-17.1.71 operational.
- `audit_evidence` index with 3y+ retention.

## Step 1 — Data collection

Via Splunk Add-on for Cisco Identity Services (1915).

## Step 2 — Implement

```ini
[UC-22.6.57: ISO 27001 A.8.2 — ISE Admin Role Evidence]
cron_schedule = 0 6 * * *
dispatch.earliest_time = -24h
actions = summary_index
action.summary_index._name = audit_evidence
action.summary_index.marker = uc=22.6.57,reg=ISO27001,clause=A.8.2
```

## Step 3 — Validate

Confirm `index=audit_evidence uc=22.6.57` populates daily.

## Step 4 — Operationalize

Build a compliance dashboard panel titled 'ISO 27001 A.8.2: ISE Privileged Access' showing: (1) Role-change timeline; (2) Super-admin grant audit table; (3) A.8.2 control status single-value.

## Step 5 — Audit

Monthly evidence pack export with control-owner attestation.

## SPL

```spl
index=nac sourcetype="cisco:ise:syslog" MessageCode IN (60050, 60051, 60052, 60100) earliest=-1d
| eval iso27001_clause="A.8.2", control="Privileged_Access"
| table _time, admin_user, admin_role, admin_action, source_ip, iso27001_clause
| collect index=audit_evidence
```

## Visualization

A.8.2 evidence panel: role-change timeline; super-admin grant gauge.

## Known False Positives

1. Bulk role updates during planned admin reorg — annotate the change ticket reference in the alert payload.

## References

- [ISO/IEC 27001:2022](https://www.iso.org/standard/27001)
